title: Universal Basic Income: Unraveling Its Economic Tapestry
topic: The Economic Ramifications of Universal Basic Income

questions.sentence: Universal Basic Income UBI a concept once relegated to the fringes of economic discourse has progressively moved into mainstream policy debates
It posits a governmental program where every citizen receives a regular unconditional sum of money irrespective of their income wealth or employment status
One of the most compelling arguments for UBI lies in its potential to eradicate extreme poverty and ameliorate income insecurity
Conversely the economic landscape under a UBI system is fraught with potential pitfalls and complex tradeoffs
The most prominent concern revolves around its colossal fiscal cost
